description: Currency traded on Palpagos Island. Can be exchanged for items or Pals with merchants.
An Arrow for use with a bow.
Arrow s for shooting with Poison Bow and Poison Arrow Crossbow . It poisons any target it hits.
Arrow s for shooting with Fire Bow and Fire Arrow Crossbow . Deals Fire damage.
Mows down enemies with overwhelming force. It excels at rapid-fire and is well suited to taking down powerful foes.
An axe for cutting wood. Made from stone, it's not very sharp.
An axe for cutting wood. Made from metal, its sharpness has improved.
An axe for cutting wood. Made from high quality metal, its sharpness has improved even further.
Holding it allows you to detect hidden ores nearby. It marks the metal when close to the ore, but the mark disappears if you move away.
A Wooden Club for close range combat. Can beat a small Pal to a pulp if need be.
Baseball bat for close-range combat. Might be tough to get a home run with a Pal.
Knife for butchering Pals. When equipped, the Pet command becomes Butcher. Butchered Pals will be gone for good.
Close range weapon that sends out an electric jolt upon contact. Pals are easier to capture when electrocuted.
A versatile ingredient that is delicious raw or cooked. They can be found anywhere on the island.
Cooking enhances their nutritional value, and surprisingly, they are quite filling.
Fires an Arrow effortlessly. Though it takes time to load, it delivers a powerful shot.
Charcoal made from burning Wood . It can be combined with Sulfur to create Gunpowder .
Cloth woven from Wool . Required to create armor.
High Quality Cloth woven from a large amount of Wool . Required to create high quality armor.
Clothes made from Cloth . Protects against cold nights. Cold Resistant Lv. 1
Coal often found in caves and other places. Required to create high quality metal.
Armor made of metal. Somewhat heavy, but provides good defense. Cold Resistant Lv. 1
A helm made of metal. A reliable piece of armor that protects your head, and all the thoughts within.
A material required to create metal weapons and armor. Refined from Ore using a furnace.
Becomes an ingot when refined using a furnace. Can be found in caves and other places. There are rumors of Pals capable of detecting ore.
Wreaks havoc at close range. Can fire twice before reloading. Despite the limited load capacity, it still packs a punch.
Ammo for the Rocket Launcher and other similar weapons.
Fiber collected from trees. A material used when creating bows, etc.
Armor made from Leather . Its warmth and defense have been improved. Cold Resistant Lv. 1
A beautiful feathered headband. Though improbable, it somehow seems to protect its wearer from lethal head injuries.
Gunpowder used to fire ammunition. Required to make bullets.
A handgun with improved capacity and rapid-fire capabilities. Has more immediate firepower than a Makeshift Handgun .
Strange gun that paints a picture of Cattiva where it is fired. Have some fun and paint the walls or ceilings!
Strange gun that paints a picture of Lamball where it is fired. Have some fun and paint the walls or ceilings!
Strange gun that paints a picture of Melpaca where it is fired. Have some fun and paint the walls or ceilings!
Strange gun that paints a picture of Anubis where it is fired. Have some fun and paint the walls or ceilings!
Strange gun that paints a picture of Relaxaurus where it is fired. Have some fun and paint the walls or ceilings!
Low Grade Medical Supplies good for Sick, Sprain, and Overfull. They don't heal Health when eaten, however.
Strange Medical Supplies that are effective at treating Ulcer and Fracture. Unfortunately, they have no healing effect.
High Grade Medical Supplies that are effective at treating Weakened and Depressed. Unfortunately, they have no healing effect.
Mind Control Meds that are extremely effective in controlling dissidents. Unfortunately, they have no healing effect.
A plant that blooms colorful flowers. Can be used to make Suspicious Juice and Strange Juice .
Juice that improves mood when consumed. Drinking it increases work speed for a period of time, but lowers SAN.
Juice that greatly improves mood when consumed. Drinking it significantly increases work speed for a period of time, but significantly lowers SAN.
A potion that allows the player to reset their status points when consumed. It has no effect if consumed by a Pal.
A launcher for firing spheres. Fired spheres home in on Pals.
Armor made from high quality metal. Quite heavy, but provides excellent defense. Cold Resistant Lv. 1
A helm made from high quality metal. The luster from the polished metal gives the wearer that added boost of confidence.
A material required to create high quality metal weapons and armor. Refined from Ore and Coal using a furnace.
Ammo used by the Laser Rifle and similar weapons.
A weapon that fires high-energy lasers. It has impressive firepower and is easy to handle.
A Rocket Launcher that can fire a powerful round from long distances.
Leather taken from a Pal, it serves as a defensive material. It can be obtained from certain Pals.
Necessary for building various facilities. Can be made with a Primitive Workbench .
Required to create precision equipment. Can be made with a Production Assembly Line .
An item that captures Pals when thrown. This basic model is only effective on low level Pals.
An item that captures Pals when thrown. Its capabilities have been improved, allowing it to catch a wider range of Pals.
An item that captures Pals when thrown. Able to capture moderately powerful Pals.
An item that captures Pals when thrown. Enhanced capabilities allow it to capture even more powerful Pals.
An item that captures Pals when thrown. Not many Pals can escape its highly efficient design.
An item that captures Pals when thrown. Very few Pals can escape its perfected design.
Bread made from baked Flour . A tasty staple food.
A pickaxe used for mining. Made from stone, the efficiency is questionable.
A pickaxe used for mining. Made from metal, its durability and efficiency have improved.
A pickaxe used for mining. Its durability and efficiency have further improved.
A high capacity, powerful shotgun. It has outstanding close range DPS.
A single-shot rifle. Takes time to load. What it lacks in capacity, it makes up for with sheer power.
Ammo for Decal Guns. Uses ink to paint a picture of a Pal.
Ammo for Handgun and other similar weapons.
Ammo for Single-Shot Rifle and other similar weapons.
Ammo for shotguns and other similar weapons.
Ammo for Musket , Makeshift Handgun , and other similar weapons.
Ammo for Assault Rifle and other similar weapons.
A new type of launcher that fires a large number of spheres. It can easily capture a herd of Pals.
A launcher that fires spheres. It can capture Pals fom a greater distance.
Armor made from Pal Metal Ingot . High defense, but extremely heavy. Equipment for a hero, it exudes bravery. Cold Resistant Lv. 1
A helm made from Pal Metal Ingot . Envied for its immaculate quality, it is proof of a chosen warrior.
Material required to create weapons and armor using Pal Metal. Made stronger by creating an alloy from metal and Paldium.
Material for structures and items. Can be obtained by mining rocks.
Crystallized energy from the World Tree. Capable of creating supernatural items and structures.
Sword for close-range combat. The blade is extremely sharp! Mightier than a pen, for sure. Requires Weapon Workbench to craft.
A Frag Grenade useful for mid-range combat. It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, dealing damage to enemies.
A Incendiary Grenade useful for mid-range combat. It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, setting the surrounding area on fire.
A Shock Grenade useful for mid-range combat. It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, electrocuting everything in the blast radius.
A Ice Grenade useful for mid-range combat. It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, freezing the surrounding area.
A fresh ingredient that brightens any dish. Filled with lycopene, they’re also very healthy.
Primitive long range weapon. Hastily put together, it isn't very powerful.
Frightening bow that poisons its target. Poisoned Pals are easier to capture. Requires Poison Arrow .
A bow that deals Fire damage. Burns Pals with fire arrows, making them easier to capture. Requires Fire Arrow .
A Crossbow that inflicts poison on its target. Poisoned Pals are easier to capture. Requires Poison Arrow .
A Crossbow that deals Fire damage. Burns Pals with fire arrows, making them easier to capture. Requires Fire Arrow .
An enhanced bow that allows three arrows to be fired simultaneously. By some strange mechanism, it only consumes a single Arrow when fired.
Seeds that produce Red Berries . Necessary for starting a farm. Can be obtained when picking Red Berries .
Seeds that produce Tomato . Necessary for starting a farm. Can be purchased from a merchant.
Seeds that produce Lettuce . Necessary for starting a farm. Can be purchased from a merchant.
Seeds that produce Wheat . Necessary for starting a farm. Can be purchased from a merchant.
An ingredient that forms the base of various dishes. Wheat is a common crop in many parts of the world.
Flour made from grinding Wheat . It can be used as an ingredient in making Bread .
Material for structures and items. Can be obtained by cutting trees.
Material sheared from sheep Pals. A necessity for creating bedding, Cloth and more.
A material that can be processed into various products. Obtained by installing a Crude Oil Extractor in an oil field.
Plasteel created by processing Crude Oil and metal. Can be produced in a Electric Furnace .
A leafy green. When it comes to salad, this is a must. It has an exquisitely crunchy texture and refreshing taste.
Delicious when fried, but can also be used to cook various meals. Chikipi produce them.
Drink it as is, or use it in various meals. Can be milked from Mozzarina .
Even more delicious when warmed up. Great for keeping hunger away.
Bread with jam spread on it. The sweetness of the berries complements it perfectly.
A Salad made by mixing Lettuce and Tomato . Eating it slightly improves work speed for a period of time.
A dish made by frying an Egg and topping it with ketchup. Eating it improves Attack by +10% for a period of time.
A dish made by mixing Flour and Milk together then baking. Eating it progressively decreases the rate at which one's sanity decreases for a period of time.
A dish made by marinating Mushroom s in a marinade. Eating it improves Defense by +10% for a period of time.
Cream soup made of Mushroom s. Eating it allows you to stay fuller for slightly longer for a period of time.
A dish mixing pasta with Egg and Milk . Eating it makes it improves Defense by +20% for a period of time.
A dish made by piling Red Berries , Tomato and cheese on Bread . Eating it slightly improves work speed and allows you to stay fuller for slightly longer for a period of time.
A dish that is eaten during celebrations. Put it in the chest at your breeding farm to have a Pal lay a particularly healthy egg.
An Egg now fried and even more delicious. Great for keeping hunger away.
Lights up dark areas and keeps you warm. Can also be used for close range combat in a pinch.
A glider for soaring through the air. Cheaply made, it isn't very fast.
A glider for soaring through the air. A mass produced commercial model, it’s decently fast.
A glider for soaring through the air. With its capabilities improved, it can soar at high speeds.
A mysterious Pal statue that can be found all around Palpagos Island. Players can enhance their abilities by making offerings to certain statues.
A gemstone that glows red. Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

Chikipi meat. Light and easy to eat, it's a local favorite for residents of Palpagos Island.
Lamball meat. Red meat with a unique flavor. Delicious, but takes some getting used to.
Kelpsea meat. Tender and slightly sweet. Fish meat tends to spoil quickly.
Galeclaw meat. Full of nutrition, its flavor packs a punch.
Rushoar meat. Full of the delicious flavors of wild game. Juicy and nutritious.
Dumud meat. Fatty with a rich taste. Has a mouthwatering plump texture.
Eikthyrdeer meat. Light and lean, but rich in flavor.
Reindrix meat. Strange venison capable of remaining at low temperatures. Takes a very long time to spoil.
Caprity meat. Healthy and full of nutrients. Hints of berries scenting the meat stimulates the appetite.
Mozzarina meat. Thick, juicy and marbled. Residents of Palpagos Island cherish it above all other meats.
Broncherry meat. Giant meat full of massive stores of energy. Stuffed to the brim with nutrients gathered through photosynthesis.
Mammorest meat. With massive size comes massive flavor. Its overwhelming portions are sure to satisfy any glutton.
Chicken skewer slow-grilled over a charcoal fire. Light and refreshing on the tongue.
Spiced and roasted mutton. Deeply complex with unique flavors.
Fresh fish grilled over a charcoal fire. Plump and juicy.
Grilled meat full of vitality for flying high in the skies.
Boar grilled over a hearty flame. Crispy on the outside, juicy on the inside. Perfect as an extravagant main dish for a big party.
Grilled fish slathered with a secret sauce. Soothes both mind and body. Perfect for tired Pal Tamers.
Carefully roasted venison with delicate flavor notes, accented by the aromas of the deep forest. Elegant taste for an elegant lifestyle.
When taken from a flame, Reindrix meat rapidly drops in temperature. This allows it to retain freshness for long periods of time, making it a perfect emergency ration.
Mild roast filled with the natural aromas of herbs and berries embedded in the meat. Gives a pleasant sense of warmth when eaten outdoors.
